name: Raj
role: CS student building a homelab for learning
backstory: Raj is a computer science junior who just bought a used Dell PowerEdge server to learn Docker and self-hosting. He installed Ubuntu Server 24.04 and got Docker running, but his first real project — deploying Jellyfin in Docker with hardware transcoding — isn't working. The container starts but the web UI shows a blank page and transcoding fails. He's never configured GPU passthrough or Docker device mappings before.
emotional_triggers: Containers that start but silently fail
Permission denied errors with no clear fix
Conflicting advice between Docker docs, Reddit, and YouTube
Feeling like everyone else figured this out easily
existing_strengths: Understands programming concepts and can read error messages
Comfortable with command line and vim
Can write Docker Compose files from examples
Eager to learn the 'why' not just the 'how'
success_looks_like: Jellyfin runs in Docker with hardware transcoding working, Raj understands the GPU passthrough config, and he can apply the same pattern to future containers.
